ground_truth.title: Costs of UCF Online Degrees | Bachelor's, Graduate
ground_truth.main_content:
You deserve the smart combination of affordability and convenience. That's why UCF Online offers 100+ online programs at a cost that works for your needs. Students enrolling in online programs receive a waiver for some campus-based fees, including health and technology. And by offering access to free scholarship searches and other financial assistance, UCF Online makes it easy to earn a high-quality education while enjoying low-cost tuition. Are you ready to invest in your education and shape your future?

Undergraduate tuition and fees total $179.19 per credit hour for Florida residents and $769.45 per credit hour for non-residents. Graduate tuition and fees total $327.32 per credit hour for Florida residents and $1,234.15 per credit hour for non-residents. Several of UCF's online graduate programs have established special costs including Master of Social Work at $487.45 per credit, Master of Science in Health Sciences at $772.69 per credit, Master of Science in Healthcare Systems Engineering at $1,239.16 per credit, Master of Science in Healthcare Informatics at $772.69 per credit, and Master of Science in Research Administration at $655.62 per credit. From scholarships and grants to student loans, there are many ways to pay for college. UCF Online undergraduate students save $33.09 per credit hour and graduate students save $42.33 per credit hour.
